title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push, create and run models from any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; use local models as LLMs, embedders or tool-wielding agents inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI); markdown, code highlighting, RAG, multimodal, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming chat, embeddings, model management, Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple idiomatic Ruby interface to chat, embed and manage local models.

title: ollama-cli (typpo)
summary: Lightweight interactive REPL wrapper around Ollama with readline history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline autocomplete and chat.

title: ollama-workflows (joshpxyne)
summary: Collection of GitHub Actions workflows to auto-pull, benchmark and deploy Ollama models in CI.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for running Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-codellama-vscode
summary: VS-Code extension that connects CodeLlama running in Ollama to generate, explain or refactor code inside the editor.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama with tray icon, model switcher and chat history stored locally.

title: ollama-ts-core
summary: Community TypeScript core library (zero deps) for Node and browsers; tree-shakeable, ESM-only, fetch-based.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama; tokio-based, serde-powered, covers chat, embeddings and model ops.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET SDK for Ollama; supports .NET 6+, nullable ref types, IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a containerized service with GPU passthrough for CI pipelines.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama; idiomatic Go API, context-based cancellation, streaming via io.Reader.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.
